languages.original_text: "The Tenets of the Bloodspun Web teach that pain is the scripture of the Undying One, carved into the skin and mind of His faithful servant. You should not seek deliverance from it, Amic'Abelard."

languages.text: "Завет Кровавой паутины учит, что боль есть скрижали Неумирающего, что высечены на коже и разуме его верного слуги. Тебе не стоит искать избавления от нее, Амик'Абеляр".
"The Tenets of the Bloodspun Web teach that pain is the scripture of the Undying One, carved into the skin and mind of His faithful servant. You should not seek deliverance from it, Amic'Abelard."

"The Tenets of the Bloodspun Web teach that pain is the scripture of the Undying One, carved into the skin and mind of His faithful servant. You should not seek deliverance from it, Amic'Abelard."

languages.text: 「血の糸の教義は、痛みは不死の者の聖典であり、その忠実なしもべの肉と心に刻まれていると説く。お前はそこから逃れようとするな、アミカベラル」
languages.original_text: "The Tenets of the Bloodspun Web teach that pain is the scripture of the Undying One, carved into the skin and mind of His faithful servant. You should not seek deliverance from it, Amic'Abelard."

traits.locale_text: 「血の糸の教義は、痛みは不死の者の聖典であり、その忠実なしもべの肉と心に刻まれていると説く。お前はそこから逃れようとするな、アミカベラル」

languages.text: « Les Préceptes de la Toile de Sang nous enseignent que la douleur est la manifestation des saintes écritures de l'Immortel, gravées dans la peau et l'esprit de Ses fidèles serviteurs. Vous ne devriez pas chercher à vous en affranchir, Amic'Abélard. »
languages.original_text: "The Tenets of the Bloodspun Web teach that pain is the scripture of the Undying One, carved into the skin and mind of His faithful servant. You should not seek deliverance from it, Amic'Abelard."

traits.locale_text: « Les Préceptes de la Toile de Sang nous enseignent que la douleur est la manifestation des saintes écritures de l'Immortel, gravées dans la peau et l'esprit de Ses fidèles serviteurs. Vous ne devriez pas chercher à vous en affranchir, Amic'Abélard. »

languages.text: "Die Grundsätze des Blutgesponnenen Netzes lehren uns, dass Schmerz die heilige Schrift des Todlosen ist, die in die Haut und den Verstand Seines treuen Dieners gemeißelt ist. Versucht nicht, Euch ihrer zu entledigen, Amic'Abelard."
languages.original_text: "The Tenets of the Bloodspun Web teach that pain is the scripture of the Undying One, carved into the skin and mind of His faithful servant. You should not seek deliverance from it, Amic'Abelard."

languages.text: "Kanipi Ağı'nın İlkeleri, acının Ölmeyen'e sadık hizmetkârının derisine ve zihnine kazınmış kutsal yazısı olduğunu öğretir. Ondan kurtuluş aramamalasın Amik'Abelard."
languages.original_text: "The Tenets of the Bloodspun Web teach that pain is the scripture of the Undying One, carved into the skin and mind of His faithful servant. You should not seek deliverance from it, Amic'Abelard."

traits.locale_text: "Kanipi Ağı'nın İlkeleri, acının Ölmeyen'e sadık hizmetkârının derisine ve zihnine kazınmış kutsal yazısı olduğunu öğretir. Ondan kurtuluş aramamalasın Amik'Abelard."

languages.text: «La Doctrina de la Red Sanguinolenta nos enseña que el dolor es la palabra del Inmortal inscribiéndose en la piel y la mente de Sus devotos. No debería eludirlo, Amic'Abelard».
languages.original_text: "The Tenets of the Bloodspun Web teach that pain is the scripture of the Undying One, carved into the skin and mind of His faithful servant. You should not seek deliverance from it, Amic'Abelard."

traits.locale_text: «La Doctrina de la Red Sanguinolenta nos enseña que el dolor es la palabra del Inmortal inscribiéndose en la piel y la mente de Sus devotos. No debería eludirlo, Amic'Abelard».

languages.text: “织血罗网的教义教导我们：痛苦乃不死之神的经文，铭刻于祂忠仆的肌肤与心神之中。你不应从中寻求解脱，信者阿贝拉德。”
languages.original_text: "The Tenets of the Bloodspun Web teach that pain is the scripture of the Undying One, carved into the skin and mind of His faithful servant. You should not seek deliverance from it, Amic'Abelard."
